title: Chromosome-level genome assembly and annotation data of the pine wood nematode carrier Arhopalus unicolor
author: Xiangying Zou
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This collection comprises the chromosome-level genome assembly and annotation data of Arhopalus unicolor, generated using a combination of Illumina, PacBio HiFi, and Hi-C sequencing technologies. It includes the final assembled pseudochromosomes, repeat element annotation, noncoding RNA annotation, protein-coding gene predictions, and associated genomic resources.
steps_raw: This collection comprises the chromosome-level genome assembly and annotation data of Arhopalus unicolor, generated using a combination of Illumina, PacBio HiFi, and Hi-C sequencing technologies. It includes the final assembled pseudochromosomes, repeat element annotation, noncoding RNA annotation, protein-coding gene predictions, and associated genomic resources.
